notes: Curated catalog of music industry entities used by the classifier prompt. The prompt is rendered from this file at runtime — adding/editing an entity here is the only change needed to teach the classifier about a new label or distributor.

artist_services_exceptions.name: AWAL
artist_services_exceptions.note: Sony-owned but artists retain ownership of masters.

artist_services_exceptions.name: ECM
artist_services_exceptions.note: Independent label distributed by UMG — distribution does not imply ownership.

artist_services_exceptions.name: Mau5trap
artist_services_exceptions.note: Independent label distributed via Virgin Music Group — distribution does not imply ownership.

artist_services_exceptions.name: Rimas Entertainment
artist_services_exceptions.note: Independently owned, distributed through The Orchard. Masters belong to Rimas, not Sony.

middle_tier.name: Empire
middle_tier.note: Operates as both an indie distributor AND a label that signs ownership deals. Ambiguous from name alone.

middle_tier.name: Believe
middle_tier.note: Large indie services group that does both distribution and ownership deals.

time_varying.name: Big Machine
time_varying.note: Ownership status depends on the recording's release_date.

time_varying.name: Mavin Records
time_varying.note: UMG acquired majority stake in Feb 2024. Pre-acquisition releases are independent.

regional_majors.name: HYBE
regional_majors.note: Major label in Korea, independent of UMG/Sony/WMG globally. Has US JVs (e.g. Geffen for Katseye) where ownership may differ by territory.

regional_majors.name: SM Entertainment
regional_majors.note: Korean major; independent of the three global majors.
